title: Sort Pairs by Second Element
code: std::sort(pairs.begin(), pairs.end(), [](const auto& a, const auto& b){ return a.second < b.second; });
description: Passes a lambda as the comparator to `std::sort` to order pairs by their second element. `const auto&` uses C++14 generic lambdas to avoid spelling out the pair type. `std::sort` runs in **O(n log n)** using introsort internally.
